View.Name: {1054159F-4268-45EA-B8FA-1FB3E75B880F}
View.CustomFormatter: {"$license":"This file is part of DataLaVista™. Copyright (c) 2026 The Regents of the University of Michigan. Licensed under GPL-3.0 or later. See https://github.com/DepressionCenter/datalavista","$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/row-formatting.schema.json","hideColumnHeader":true,"hideSelection":false,"rowFormatter":{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","align-items":"center","padding":"12px 16px","border-bottom":"1px solid #e0e6ef","background-color":"=if(@rowIndex % 2 == 0, '#ffffff', '#fcfcfc')","box-sizing":"border-box","width":"100%"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'flex', 'none'))","align-items":"center","justify-content":"center","width":"42px","height":"42px","border-radius":"8px","margin-right":"16px","flex-shrink":"0","background-color":"#00274C","color":"#FFCB05","font-size":"22px","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer"},"attributes":{"iconName":"BIDashboard","href":"=@currentWeb + '/SitePages/DataLaVista.aspx?report=' + if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/')) + [$FileRef], if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/')) + [$FileRef], @currentWeb + [$FileRef])) + 'reportMode=view&env=Embedded'","target":"_blank","title":"Launch DataLaVista Dashboard"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'flex', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbix', 'flex', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbit', 'flex', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'loop', 'flex', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'mp4', 'flex', 'none')))))","align-items":"center","justify-content":"center","width":"42px","height":"42px","border-radius":"8px","margin-right":"16px","flex-shrink":"0","background-color":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', '#fff4cc', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbix', '#FFCB05', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbit', '#FFCB05', '#e8edf2')))","color":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', '#00274C', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbix', '#00274C', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbit', '#00274C', '#2c4a5e')))","font-size":"22px","cursor":"pointer"},"attributes":{"iconName":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'FabricFolder', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbix', 'PowerBILogo', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbit', 'PowerBILogo', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'loop', 'PageLink', 'Video'))))","title":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'Open folder', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'loop', 'Open Loop component', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'mp4', 'Play video', 'Open Power BI file')))"},"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbix', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbit', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'loop', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'mp4', 'none', 'flex'))))))","align-items":"center","justify-content":"center","width":"42px","height":"42px","border-radius":"8px","margin-right":"16px","flex-shrink":"0","background-color":"#f0f4f8","cursor":"pointer"},"children":[{"elmType":"img","style":{"width":"24px","height":"24px"},"attributes":{"src":"=if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'url', 'https://static2.sharepointonline.com/files/fabric/assets/item-types/20/link.svg', 'https://static2.sharepointonline.com/files/fabric/assets/item-types/20/' + [$File_x0020_Type] + '.svg')","title":"=[$FileLeafRef] + ' - Open file'","alt":"=[$File_x0020_Type] + ' file'"}}],"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"}},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","align-items":"center","justify-content":"space-between","width":"340px","padding-right":"24px","flex-shrink":"1"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'flex', 'none'))","flex-direction":"column","flex-grow":"1","text-decoration":"none","cursor":"pointer","overflow":"hidden","padding-right":"8px"},"attributes":{"href":"=@currentWeb + '/SitePages/DataLaVista.aspx?report=' + if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/')) + [$FileRef], if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/')) + [$FileRef], @currentWeb + [$FileRef])) + '&reportMode=view&&env=Embedded'","target":"_blank","title":"=[$FileLeafRef] + ' - Launch DataLaVista Dashboard'"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"[$FileLeafRef]","style":{"font-weight":"600","font-size":"14px","color":"#00274C","white-space":"nowrap","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis"}},{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"DataLaVista™ Dashboard","style":{"font-size":"12px","color":"#4a6278","margin-top":"2px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'flex', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'none', 'flex'))","flex-direction":"column","flex-grow":"1","cursor":"pointer","overflow":"hidden","padding-right":"8px"},"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"[$FileLeafRef]","style":{"font-weight":"600","font-size":"14px","color":"#00274C","white-space":"nowrap","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis"}},{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'Folder', if(endsWith([$FileLeafRef],'json'), 'DataLaVista™ Dashboard', if(endsWith([$FileLeafRef],'pbi') || endsWith([$FileLeafRef],'pbix') || endsWith([$FileLeafRef],'pbit'), 'Power BI Report', 'File (' + [$File_x0020_Type] + ')')))","style":{"font-size":"12px","color":"#4a6278","margin-top":"2px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"iconName":"MoreVertical","title":"More options for this item"},"customRowAction":{"action":"openContextMenu"},"style":{"cursor":"pointer","padding":"4px","font-size":"16px","color":"#00274C","display":"flex","align-items":"center","justify-content":"center","flex-shrink":"0"}}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","flex-direction":"column","width":"180px","flex-shrink":"0","padding-right":"16px"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"[$Editor.title]","style":{"font-size":"12px","color":"#00274C","white-space":"nowrap","overflow":"hidden","text-overflow":"ellipsis"}},{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"[$Modified]","style":{"font-size":"11px","color":"#5f7282","margin-top":"2px"}}]},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex","align-items":"center","gap":"10px","flex-shrink":"0"},"children":[{"elmType":"a","txtContent":"✏️ Edit","attributes":{"href":"=@currentWeb + '/SitePages/DataLaVista.aspx?report=' + if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/')) + [$FileRef], if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/')) + [$FileRef], @currentWeb + [$FileRef])) + '&reportMode=edit&env=Embedded'","target":"_blank","title":"=[$FileLeafRef] + ' - Edit Dashboard'"},"style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'inline-block', 'none'))","padding":"6px 14px","border":"1px solid rgba(0, 39, 76, 0.25)","color":"#2d5078","border-radius":"20px","font-size":"12px","font-weight":"500","text-decoration":"none","white-space":"nowrap","cursor":"pointer"}},{"elmType":"a","txtContent":"▶ Launch","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'inline-block', 'none'))","padding":"6px 18px","background-color":"#00274C","color":"#FFCB05","border-radius":"20px","font-size":"12px","font-weight":"600","text-decoration":"none","white-space":"nowrap","cursor":"pointer"},"attributes":{"href":"=@currentWeb + '/SitePages/DataLaVista.aspx?report=' + if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/sites/')) + [$FileRef], if(indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/') > 0, substring(@currentWeb, 0, indexOf(@currentWeb, '/teams/')) + [$FileRef], @currentWeb + [$FileRef])) + '&reportMode=view&env=Embedded'","target":"_blank","title":"=[$FileLeafRef] + ' - Launch Dashboard'"}},{"elmType":"div","txtContent":"⚡ Open","style":{"display":"=if([$FSObjType] == '1', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'json', 'none', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbix', 'inline-block', if([$File_x0020_Type] == 'pbit', 'inline-block', 'none'))))","padding":"6px 18px","background-color":"#FFCB05","color":"#00274C","border-radius":"20px","font-size":"12px","font-weight":"600","text-decoration":"none","white-space":"nowrap","cursor":"pointer"},"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"}}]}]}}
